name: Three Willows
region: North of Alder Run on the road out of Millhaven

sensoryProfile.sight: Not directly seen; known only as a named settlement farther up the same threatened line.
sensoryProfile.touch: A reported settlement on the route north, still abstract to the POV by chapter end.
sensoryProfile.atmosphere: Another live place about to become part of the emergency map.

establishedFacts.fact: Paret names Three Willows as one of the settlements north of Millhaven that may still have people alive on the road.

eventsHere.event: Becomes part of the warning route once Sylvanas sends Neral north.
